items.speaker: KU-Key
items.text: Master {PlayerName}! You finally answered!

items.speaker: KU-Key
items.text: Do you remember me? It's KU-Key!

items.speaker: KU-Key
items.text: You know, the top assistant of our Master of Cleaning at the Black Shores? Ring any bells?

items.speaker: KU-Key
items.text: The little robot you've saved so many times…

items.speaker: KU-Key
items.text: Yes, it's me! I knew you wouldn't forget me!

items.speaker: KU-Key
items.text: I'm reaching out because I need your help. Our system detected a frequency almost identical to the Aetherfin's in the Black Shores.

items.speaker: KU-Key
items.text: But the location's still covered in corrupted data and needs some cleaning…

items.speaker: KU-Key
items.text: And you, Master {PlayerName}, are definitely the best person for the job!

items.speaker: KU-Key
items.text: Super cleaner duo, ready to show again! Let's go Aetherfishing, {PlayerName}!

items.speaker: KU-Key
items.text: Ku ku ku, the Aetherfin is a legendary Remnant creature that hasn't been seen in two decades!

items.speaker: KU-Key
items.text: But instead of listening to me ramble, how about you come see it for yourself?

items.speaker: KU-Key
items.text: It's KU-Key, Master {PlayerName}…

items.speaker: KU-Key
items.text: Anyway, I've sent the coordinates to you.

items.speaker: KU-Key
items.text: I'll be waiting there, so don't keep me hanging!

items.speaker: Black Shores Researcher
items.text: Hey, KU-Key, I just noticed the corrupted data in the upper area has been cleaned. Are you with {PlayerName} now?

items.speaker: KU-Key
items.text: Yes! We just saved a bunch of Aetherfins!

items.speaker: Black Shores Researcher
items.text: Good job, you two. There's another emergency for you. I'll keep it short.

items.speaker: Black Shores Researcher
items.text: Our frequency monitor just detected more Aetherfins in the lower area.

items.speaker: Black Shores Researcher
items.text: The waveform matches what you uploaded, so they might be trapped in corrupted data too.

items.speaker: Black Shores Researcher
items.text: Could you go check it out?

items.speaker: KU-Key
items.text: No problem! Just leave it to us!
